# agents

Interactive terminal UI for AI agents.

## Usage

```console
coder agents [flags] [chat-id]
```

## Options

### --workspace

|      |                     |
|------|---------------------|
| Type | <code>string</code> |

Associate the chat with a workspace by name, owner/name, or UUID.

### --model

|      |                     |
|------|---------------------|
| Type | <code>string</code> |

Choose a model by ID, provider/model, or display name.
